Priority signals

3 OF 312 · RANKED BY ATLAS

Two parties just slipped past 45 days. Vinod Trading and Sai Industries — together ₹18.4L, and both broke their reorder rhythm.
since 06:00 ◇ drafted by atlas
Goyal Carpets cleared ₹9.42L. Right on the 27-day cadence — atlas auto-issued the receipt and reconciled.
08:42 ◇ auto-actioned
Wire Mat HD-018 will fall below par in 11 days. Monsoon window opens 7 Jun. Atlas staged a PO of 240 units — your signal to release.
07:55 ◇ drafted by atlas
Margin on Foot Mat dropped 1.4 points. Raw price moved 3.2% in two suppliers. One alternate quote matches your floor.

RANKED · UNRESOLVED FIRST
